commands.title: Fill Block Command
commands.description:
Mass-place blocks in a specified cuboid region.

Learning Points:
• Max volume is usually 32,768 blocks
• Can use 'hollow' or 'outline' modes
• Replaces existing blocks by default
commands.syntaxBreakdown:
1. /fill: Bulk placement logic.
2. ~ ~ ~: Start corner (Relative).
3. ~10 ~ ~10: End corner (Relative offset).
4. stone: Item/Block ID to fill with.

commands.title: Clone Structure
commands.description:
Duplicates a structure from source to destination.

Learning Points:
• Source and destination can overlap
• Retains block data and chest contents
• Useful for rapid city building
commands.syntaxBreakdown:
1. /clone: Duplication protocol.
2. Start Coords: Corner 1 of source.
3. End Coords: Corner 2 of source.
4. Destination: Corner 1 where to paste.
